title: Made in Abyss GUI Custom Pack
description: Made in Abyss GUI Custom Pack
body:
**![Preview Image](https://i.imgur.com/FyyPSle.png)**

**Introduction:**
This resource pack is dedicated to GUI elements and seamlessly integrates with other resource packs. 
This is a GUI packed themed towards the show "Made in Abyss GUI Pack". Don't hesitate to comment down below , I have even changed hot bar as well hope you enjoy.

The palette that I choose is Green & Brown but maybe in the future.
If you guys want other colors like Blue & Yellow or any colors else.
please tell me I will think about it!

If you found any bugs please report to me I will fix it as soon as I can.


**Feature Highlights:**
- **Settings:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/HbjTyii.png)
- **Hud:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/klaTpeC.png)
- **Brewing Stand:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/deb7EqC.png)
- **Crafting Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/NZi5agd.png)
- **Furnace:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/GGZcmHN.png)
- **Anvil:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/BggtjLa.png)
- **Loom:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/4baCX0H.png)
- **Cartography Table:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/kzfuAVP.png)
- **Shulker Box:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/ZfGy0ze.png)
- **Beacon Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/iYgL5iB.png)
- **Villager Trading Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/Duob0a8.png)
- **Creative Menu:** ![Image](https://i.imgur.com/XCClsqA.png)

**Community Engagement:**
Join our Discord server to suggest and vote for the next pack, participate in discussions, and have a chance to win Discord Nitro giveaways every month. [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph)

**Thank you for your support! ❤️**
